title: SNEWS2 Coincidence Alert
description: Supernova Early Warning System (SNEWS 2.0) coincidence network capabilities.

snews2_tier.description: The categorization of the SNEWS 2.0 alert type (e.g., CoincidenceTier, SignificanceTier, TimingTier) indicating the nature of the supernova detection.

detector_status.description: Status of SNEWS2 detectors at the time of the alert.

event_times_utc.description: Primary timestamp(s) for the event from the detectors.

tier_data.description: Tier-specific data payload containing p-values, detector statistics, etc.

neutrino_time_utc.description: The aggregated neutrino arrival time across the coincidence network.

p_values.description: The p-values representing the significance of the signal from each respective detector.

false_alarm_prob.description: The calculated false alarm probability of the coincidence.
